summary: Round 5 cached distance dispatch landed correctly but this authority rerun is inconclusive for performance attribution: Rust same-schema HNSW remained 819.471 qps at recall 0.9959 (no measurable change versus the round-5 baseline), while the native capture dropped to 9342.693 qps at recall 0.95. The resulting ratio looks better (11.40x) only because native moved down by about 25.2%, not because Rust moved up. This evidence is therefore insufficient for verdict refresh.
action: Keep the historical HNSW family verdict unchanged and rerun the round-5 authority lane with a stability gate (repeat native and Rust captures) before accepting any ratio movement as real optimization gain.
